events.title: Ringo Starr turns 86
events.blurb: Drummer, singer, and songwriter Ringo Starr, born in Liverpool in 1940, celebrates his 86th birthday.

angles.name: Ringo's Big Day
angles.copy: Happy 86th birthday to the legendary Ringo Starr! From The Beatles' beat to his solo hits, what's your favourite Ringo moment?

events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Queen's iconic guitarist, songwriter, and astrophysicist Sir Brian May, born in Hampton Hill, Middlesex in 1947, celebrates his 79th birthday.

angles.name: Guitar God's Birthday
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 79th birthday to the one and only Brian May! What's your favourite Queen guitar solo?

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The Rolling Stones' legendary frontman, Sir Mick Jagger, born in Dartford, Kent in 1943, celebrates his 83rd birthday.

angles.name: Rock Icon's Birthday
angles.copy: Eighty-three years young and still rolling! Happy birthday to the incomparable Mick Jagger. What's your go-to Stones anthem?

events.title: MTV launched
events.blurb: On this day in 1981, MTV officially launched, forever changing the music landscape, with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' being its very first music video.

angles.name: MTV's Big Bang
angles.copy: Forty-five years ago today, MTV launched and changed music forever. Did video really kill the radio star, or just make it even better?

events.title: Oasis' 'Definitely Maybe' released
events.blurb: Oasis' groundbreaking debut album, 'Definitely Maybe,' was released on August 29, 1994, becoming a cornerstone of Britpop.

angles.name: Britpop Classic
angles.copy: Still sounds as fresh today! Oasis' 'Definitely Maybe' dropped back in '94 and changed everything. What's your favourite track?

events.title: Woodstock Festival began
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Music & Art Fair, a pivotal event in music history, took place from August 15-18, 1969, in Bethel, New York.

angles.name: Peace, Love & Music
angles.copy: Fifty-seven years ago today, the iconic Woodstock Festival kicked off. Three days of peace, love, and music that defined a generation.

events.title: Anniversary of Elvis Presley's death
events.blurb: Today marks the anniversary of the passing of the King of Rock 'n' Roll, Elvis Presley, who died on August 16, 1977.

angles.name: Remembering The King
angles.copy: Remembering Elvis Presley on the anniversary of his passing. His music and legacy continue to inspire generations. What's your favourite Elvis track?

events.title: The Beatles' 'Abbey Road' released
events.blurb: The Beatles' iconic album 'Abbey Road' was released in the UK on September 26, 1969.

angles.name: Abbey Road Legacy
angles.copy: The album cover is as famous as the music! The Beatles' 'Abbey Road' was released in '69. What's your standout track from this masterpiece?

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: The formidable frontwoman of The Pretenders, Chrissie Hynde, born in Akron, Ohio in 1951, celebrates her 75th birthday.

angles.name: Pretenders' Powerhouse
angles.copy: Happy 75th birthday to the rock 'n' roll legend Chrissie Hynde! What's your favourite Pretenders hit?

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: Oasis frontman and solo artist Liam Gallagher, born in Manchester in 1972, celebrates his 54th birthday.

angles.name: Mad for Liam
angles.copy: Happy 54th birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher! What's your favourite Oasis or solo track from the man himself?

events.title: John Lennon's 'Imagine' released
events.blurb: John Lennon's iconic album 'Imagine' was released on September 9, 1971, with the title track later released as a single on October 11, 1971 in the US.

angles.name: Imagine's Message
angles.copy: Fifty-five years since John Lennon gave us 'Imagine'. A song that still resonates globally. What does it mean to you?

events.title: Apple released the first iPod
events.blurb: Apple unveiled the first iPod on October 23, 2001, promising '1,000 songs in your pocket,' and it became available for purchase on November 10, 2001.

angles.name: The Music Revolution
angles.copy: Twenty-five years ago, the first iPod was announced. It changed how we listen to music forever. What was your first iPod moment?

events.title: James Bond Day
events.blurb: James Bond Day celebrates the premiere of the first James Bond film, 'Dr. No,' on October 5, 1962.

angles.name: Bond, James Bond
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! From iconic gadgets to unforgettable theme songs, what's your favourite 007 moment?

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: Visionary musician, songwriter, and peace activist John Lennon, born in Liverpool in 1940, would have celebrated his 86th birthday today.

angles.name: Lennon's Legacy
angles.copy: Remembering John Lennon on what would have been his 86th birthday. His music and message of peace live on.
